final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a retro American road-trip scene.

Style/medium: needs a retro American aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a red convertible as the focal subject

Scene/backdrop: must include Route 66, desert landscape, cacti, and a sunset sky dyed orange-red
Lighting/mood: needs a sunset atmosphere with free-spirited energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be orange-red dominant sunset tones
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
